description: Style NoteFall head over heels in love with this chic and stylish backpack from baggit. Its timeless design is set to see you through many seasons to come. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can pair this bag with western as well as ethnic ensembles.Product DetailsDark green velvet finish backpack with branding in frontTwo mesh padded adjustable shoulder strapsShort haul loopA flap in front with magnetic closureZippered main compartment with internal compartmentZippered compartment under the flapPadded compartment which opens from the left side big enough to store a 15&rdquo laptopOne small zippered compartment in front One open compartment on the right side with drawstringMaterial and CareFabric, syntheticWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtSizeHeight: 38 cmWidth: 37 cmDepth: 6 cm
